query: Write a landing page headline and value proposition for a project management tool aimed at remote engineering teams.
expected_behavior: Positions the customer (remote engineering team) as the Hero, not the product
Headline is under 10 words and avoids generic phrases like 'game-changing' or 'seamlessly'
Value proposition is at Grade 8 reading level or below
Contains no banned AI slop terms (delve, tapestry, nuanced, harness, landscape)
